To advance precision oncology, healthcare AI should not only inform about cancer incidence 
and tumour growth, but must identify the optimal treatment path, accounting for treatment￾related side effects, socioeconomic factors, and care goals. Precision medicine can therefore 
only be achieved by merging complex and diverse multimodal data that span space and
